text.title: Idempotent Message Queue Consumers Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply mq-idempotent-consumers end-to-end.

step.name: pick-dedup-store
step.action: Choose Redis (TTL set) or DB (unique constraint) or DynamoDB conditional write.

step.name: design-event-schema
step.action: Add idempotency_key field; register schema with version.

step.name: write-consumer
step.action: Implement reserve-before-execute: atomic SETNX → side-effect → commit → ack.

step.name: add-outbox
step.action: Move producer publish into the outbox relay pattern.

step.name: validate-and-replay-test
step.action: Run validator; replay-test by sending the same message 10x and asserting one side-effect.
